note.en: Place a {C/Healer} on the leftmost position to prevent the boss from gaining {B/REDUCED_DAMAGE_TAKEN}. {E/Earth} and {E/Water} DPS deal increased damage.
note.jp: ボスの{B/REDUCED_DAMAGE_TAKEN}を防ぐため、{C/Healer}を最左に配置。{E/Earth}と{E/Water} DPSがダメージ増加。
note.kr: 보스의 {B/REDUCED_DAMAGE_TAKEN}를 방지하려면 {C/Healer}를 가장 왼쪽에 배치. {E/Earth}와 {E/Water} DPS가 피해 증가.
note.zh: 将{C/Healer}放在最左侧以防止首领获得{B/REDUCED_DAMAGE_TAKEN}。{E/Earth}和{E/Water} DPS造成更多伤害。
note.fr: Placez un {C/Healer} sur la position la plus à gauche pour empêcher le boss de gagner {B/REDUCED_DAMAGE_TAKEN}. Les DPS {E/Earth} et {E/Water} infligent plus de dégâts.
